rationale: Major friction: this is a kitchen/pantry organization satisfaction hook (red pepper into a labeled jar) — the pastel pink/red palette and domestic 3D-render aesthetic clash hard with Bounce Blast's dark moody purple/yellow palette and abstract physics-puzzle visuals, and the "pour into jar" action has zero visual analog to tap-to-place block clearing or ball chain reactions. Audience overlaps modestly on the casual 25-55 satisfaction-seeker axis, but with only 1 creative from 1 advertiser and stale freshness (143d), there's no proven scaling signal. Recommend skipping unless we can fully reskin the hook to a physics-pour-into-grid metaphor using the game's actual palette.
